titleStmt.title: SII 36.121: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 121. (A.R. No. 121 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On the south wall of the first prākāra in the Mūlasthānēśvara temple.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Sundara Pāṇḍya I. Year 4: A.D. 1220.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. This inscription records the official order (uḷvari) of a gift of land measuring 8(1/2) mā as maḍappura iṟaiyili to Ñānadēvar of the Vaṉanāyakan-maṭha, situated in the southern street of the temple of Mūlasthānam Uḍaiyār at Teṉ-Kallaga-nāḍu, by Krishṇa Bhaṭṭaṉ and Nārāyaṇaṉ Subrahmaṇya Bhaṭṭaṉ, the two residents of Chōḻakulāntakachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pāgaṉūr-kūṟṟam. The grant was executed in the presence of Maḻavarāyar and taxes antarāyam, viṉiyōkam, mākkalam and taḍippadakku were exempted. The signatures of tax officials are appended at the end of the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ koṉermai koṇṭāṉ teṉkallaka nāṭṭu śrī mūlasthāṉamuṭaiyār tirumaṭaiviḷākattut teṟkutteruvil vaṉanāyakaṉ maṭattu tapasyaril
ñāṉatevaṟkum tam sandānattu tapasyaṟkum maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākap paākaṉūṟ kūṟṟattu coḻakulāntakac caturvvedimaṅkalattuk kārāmpiṟ śrīkraṣṇabhaṭṭaṉum nālūr pāṟkuṇṭiṉaṉ nārā
yaṇaṉ subrahmaṇya bhaṭṭaṉum pakkal tam parākrama pāṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷaiyil mel kūṟṟil vilaikoṇṭa nilattukku vilaipramāṇappaṭi Arumoḻitevap pilāṟṟukku meṟku divākara vati
kkut teṟku patiṉāṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟup patinālām pāṭakattil Oru māvum patiṉeḻāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟup patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakan teṟkaṭaiya nilamarai māvum paṉṉiraṇṭām pāṭaka nila Oru māvum
patiṉmūṉṟām pāṭakam nilam māvum patiṉālām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaiya nila marai māvum patiṉeṭṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu patiṉoṉṟām pāṭaka nila ṭām pāṭaka nila Oru
palāṟṟukku meṟku mūvaṭi vītikkut teṟku Añcāṅ teṟkaṭaiya
ṭām pāṭaka nila Oru māvum Ākappāṭaka nilam Eṇmāvaraiyum nālāvatu mutal Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum mākkalamum ta patakkum Uṭpaṭa
meṉṟu maḻavarāyar namakku coṉṉamaiyil vaṉanāyakaṉmaṭattu tapasyaril ñāṉa tevaṟkum yivar sandāṉattu tapasyaṟkum maṭappuṟayiṟaiyiliyāka pākaṉūr kūṟṟattu coḻakul[ Ān=takac] catu
rvvedimaṅkalattu kārampiṟceṭṭu śrīkraṣṇabhaṭṭaṉum nālūr kuṇḍiṉṉa nārāyaṇaṉ subrahmaṇya bhaṭṭaṉum pakkal parākrama pāṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷaiyil me
māvaraiyum yivvāṇṭu mutal Antarāyamum viniyokamum mākkalamum taṭippatakku muṭpaṭa maṭappuṟayiṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭuk keḻviyum variyilāreḻuttiṭṭavuḷvariyun tarac coṉṉo
m Ippaṭi cantrādittavaṟai celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭuvittukko maturodaya vaḷanāṭṭuk kāñaiyirukkaiyārkkum muttaṉ Āṭkoṇṭavilliyāṉa mī
ṉavataraiyaṉeṉ Eḻuttu miḻalaik kūṟṟa tāyiṉum nallūṟ tuñcalūruṭaiyāṉ māvala
vāmaṉ Eḻuttu
svastiśrī yāṇṭu nālāvatu Aṉtarāyamum viṉiyokamum mākkalamum taṭipatakkum makappaṭa maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari cela śrīmūla
ttāṉamuṭaiyār tirumaṭaiviḷākattu teṟki teruvil vaṉanāyakaṉ maṭattut tapasyaril ñāṉatevaṟkum ttukku
viṉiyokamum mākkalamum taṭippatakkum Uṭpaṭa maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākap pākaṉūrk kūṟṟattu
bhaṭṭaṉum nālūrk kuṇṉanārāyaṇaṉ subramaṇya paṭṭaṉum pakkal
Digital edition of SII 36.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
